title: Terra
body:
Terra is a modern world generation modding platform that allows complete customization of world generation with an advanced API, tightly integrated with a powerful configuration system.

Terra provides a set of core addons which implement a "standard" config schema, as well as a default overworld config pack.

# Installation

To install Terra, visit the [Getting Started](https://terra.polydev.org/install/index.html) page on our wiki, and choose the installation guide for your platform. Remember to choose the correct version of Terra for your Minecraft version! (see the [versions](https://terra.polydev.org/install/versions.html) wiki page).

# Platforms
Terra's platform-agnostic design ensures all world generation happens completely independently of Minecraft, allowing Terra to be easily portable across platforms.

Currently, Terra supports:
* Fabric - Download on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/terra).
* Forge - Download on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/terra).
* Quilt - Download on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/terra).
* Bukkit (Paper servers) - Download on [SpigotMC](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/terra.85151/)

# Links
* [Issues](https://modrinth.com/mod/terra)
* [Source Code](https://github.com/PolyhedralDev/Terra)

# Community Packs

Terra provides world generation through configuration packs. Various config packs made by the Terra community are accessible at the [Community Packs](https://terra.polydev.org/config/community-packs.html) page. Below is a showcase of the community packs available through the linked page:

# Beta

Terra is currently in **BETA**. While Terra is stable and production-ready, and the default Overworld Config provides all Vanilla resources, Terra is not feature-complete. There is a lot to be added!

# Donate

If you like Terra, please consider donating ~~so I can buy more Dr. Pepper~~:

* [dfsek's Patreon](https://patreon.com/dfsek)
* [duplex's Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/duplexsystem)

You can also support us for free by starring [our repository on GitHub](https://github.com/PolyhedralDev/Terra)! GitHub rolls out new beta features first to repositories with more stars, so starring our repo is a great way to support us!
